外國車迷

This goes to the fans in support of Conte.
Give me a reason why he shouldn't be sacked.
Playing with 5 defenders, 3 central midfielders, 1 winger and a striker.
How will two strikers breakthrough a 5-man defence of the opposition? Yet you all blame Morata.
He replaced Drinkwater with willian and still maintained his 3-5-2 with willian playing as a CM.

Subbing off Hazard @70mins when the match was 0-0 for bakayoko. Meaning he was satisfied with the draw.
Conte is defensive minded, he his only concerned with the defensive area and he cares less about the number of goals we score.

The solution is to return to 3-4-3 formation, playing Hazard- Morata- Willian/Pedro, KANTE - Drinkwater/Fabregas in midfield. Bakayoko is meant to go on loan or be brought in as a sub just like what Guardiola is doing with Bernardo Silva.

Or go back to 4-2-3-1 playing Kante- Drinkwater/ Fabregas: Hazard- Barkley/Fabregas- Willian/Pedro: Morata.
Give chance to the likes of musonda and Kennedy.
Then you will see best of Chelsea.

If Conte can't do these, then to hell with him. There are better attacking managers out there. We are tired of boring football. The things we are proud of are: Pass completion,Tackles won,Blocks and interceptions etc.
Are these the primary aim of a football match?
#Conte-Needs-To-Go.
#No-More-Boring-Football.

Report: De Vrij says yes to Lazio

Stefan de Vrij could snub Inter, Juventus and Manchester United by signing a new contract with Lazio on Monday.

His current deal is due to expire in June and he would be allowed to leave as a free agent at the end of this season.

That had seemed increasingly likely, as Lazio would not listen to January offers, confident they could talk him around.

According to La Gazzetta dello Sport, the approach has worked, because De Vrij could put pen to paper on a new contract when he returns from vacation on Monday.

The 25-year-old Dutch international would have an increased salary to €2.5m per year plus bonuses.

Above all, the release clause would be reduced from €25m to just €20m.
